text: The secret of getting ahead is getting started.
translation: Oldinga intilishning siri - boshlashdadir.
author: Mark Twain

text: It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.
translation: Qanchalik sekin yurishingizning ahamiyati yo'q, asosiysi to'xtamaslikdir.
author: Confucius

text: Everything you’ve ever wanted is on the other side of fear.
translation: Siz xohlagan hamma narsa qo'rquvning narigi tomonida joylashgan.
author: George Addair

text: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.
translation: Muvaffaqiyat yakuniy emas, muvaffaqiyatsizlik o'limga olib kelmaydi: davom etishga bo'lgan jasorat muhim.
author: Winston Churchill

text: Hardships often prepare ordinary people for an extraordinary destiny.
translation: Qiyinchiliklar ko'pincha oddiy odamlarni g'ayrioddiy taqdirga qabul qiladi va tayyorlaydi.
author: C.S. Lewis

text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
translation: Bunga ishonish - yo'lning yarmiga yetish demakdir.
author: Theodore Roosevelt

text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
translation: Buyuk ishlarni qilishning yagona yo'li - o'z ishingni sevishdir.
author: Steve Jobs

text: A habit of consistent effort is better than occasional brilliance.
translation: Doimiy harakatlanish odati kamdan-kam porlab chiqishdan afzalroqdir.
author: Robin Sharma

text: Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
translation: Soatga qaramang; u nima qilsa shuni qiling. Harakatda davom eting.
author: Sam Levenson

text: Fall seven times and stand up eight.
translation: Yetti marta yiqilsangiz ham, sakkizinchi marta o'rningizdan turing.
author: Japanese Proverb

text: The harder you work for something, the greater you'll feel when you achieve it.
translation: Biror narsa ustida qanchalik qattiq ishlaganingiz sari, unga erishganingizda shunchalik o'zingizni zo'r his qilasiz.
author: Unknown

text: Learning another language is not only learning different words for the same things, but learning another way to think about things.
translation: Boshqa tilni o'rganish - bu nafaqat bir xil narsalar uchun boshqacha so'zlarni o'rganish, balki narsalar haqida fikrlashning boshqa yo'lini o'rganishdir.
author: Flora Lewis

text: To have another language is to possess a second soul.
translation: Boshqa tilga ega bo'lish - bu ikkinchi qalbga ega bo'lish demakdir.
author: Charlemagne

text: One language sets you in a corridor for life. Two languages open every door along the way.
translation: Bitta til sizni umrbod bir yo'lakka qo'yadi. Ikkita til esa yo'lingizdagi barcha eshiklarni ochadi.
author: Frank Smith

text: You are never too old to set another goal or to dream a new dream.
translation: Yangi maqsad qo'yish yoki yangi orzu qilish uchun hech qachon qari emassiz.
author: C.S. Lewis

text: If you are not willing to risk the usual, you will have to settle for the ordinary.
translation: Agar tavakkal qilishga tayyor bo'lmasangiz, oddiy narsalarga qanoat qilishingizga to'g'ri keladi.
author: Jim Rohn

text: It always seems impossible until it's done.
translation: U doim qilib bo'lingunga qadar imkonsizdek tuyuladi.
author: Nelson Mandela

text: Action is the foundational key to all success.
translation: Harakat barcha muvaffaqiyatlarning asosiy kalitidir.
author: Pablo Picasso

text: Success consists of going from failure to failure without loss of enthusiasm.
translation: Muvaffaqiyat - ishtiyoqni yo'qotmasdan mag'lubiyatdan mag'lubiyatga borishdir.
author: Winston Churchill

text: Don't limit your challenges. Challenge your limits.
translation: Qiyinchiliklaringizni cheklamang. O'z chegaralaringizga qarshi chiqing.
author: Unknown
